description: Create and deploy a channel named 'Lab_Result_File_Ingestion' in NextGen Connect. The channel must read HL7 files from /opt/mirthdata/input, move processed files to /opt/mirthdata/processed, and write the output to /opt/mirthdata/output. Configure a transformer to set the MSH-5 (Receiving Application) field to 'LAB_REPOSITORY'. Test the deployment using the file located at /home/ga/test_oru.hl7.
